caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with gold text that reads "BOSS TALK", and a gold watch sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a microphone on a boom arm, with a black office chair behind him. To his left is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. Above him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black mug with red and white text reading "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD" sits on the table beside him. As the scene progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his right hand, moving it from his chest to an open outward position. He remains seated and focused on someone off-camera throughout the sequence, while the background and equipment remain static.
